description: Tier-2 NATS transport over a real network hop (not loopback).

setup.client: remote workstation (NATS client only, no local subscriber)
setup.responder: echo responder on Atlas, co-existing on the production :4222 bus on an isolated subject
setup.note: raw batch capped <1MB to respect the production bus default max_payload

finding: On a bandwidth-limited real link the compression win scales with payload toward the raw ratio (~10x): 1.2x at 4KB (latency-bound) to 8.4x at 256KB (link-bound). Demonstrates the Tier-1 crossover on a real network, not just loopback or the analytic model.
